title: UN World Population Prospects 2024 — General Demographic Indicators (F01)
abstract: United Nations World Population Prospects 2024 revision, General file F01 'Demographic Indicators' — annual population, fertility, mortality, and migration indicators for all countries and regions of the world, 1950-2023 (Estimates sheet), with additional projection-variant sheets to 2100. Includes Saudi Arabia as one of ~300 geographic entities; not Red-Sea or coastal-specific.

variables.name: total_population
variables.label: Total Population, as of 1 January / 1 July
variables.description: Total population (both sexes) for the region/country/area and year.

variables.name: population_density
variables.label: Population Density
variables.description: National population density for the country/area and year.

variables.name: total_fertility_rate
variables.label: Total Fertility Rate
variables.description: Average number of live births per woman over her reproductive lifetime.

variables.name: life_expectancy_at_birth
variables.label: Life Expectancy at Birth, Both Sexes
variables.description: Number of years a newborn would live if current mortality patterns persisted.

variables.name: net_migration_rate
variables.label: Net Migration Rate
variables.description: Net number of migrants divided by the population, expressed per 1,000 population, for the year.

access.how_to_request: Freely downloadable from https://population.un.org/wpp/ under UN open data terms; no request required.

provenance.originator: United Nations, Department of Economic and Social Affairs, Population Division
provenance.citation: United Nations, Department of Economic and Social Affairs, Population Division (2024). World Population Prospects 2024, Online Edition.

known_issues: Full global file (300 geographic entities, ~21,983 rows in the Estimates sheet alone); Saudi Arabia rows have not been extracted into a Red-Sea-specific subset.
National-level indicators only — no subnational or coastal-governorate breakdown is possible from this source.

Workbook also contains 13 additional projection-variant sheets (Medium/High/Low/Constant-fertility/etc., to 2100) not itemized in the variables list above; only the historical 'Estimates' sheet (1950-2023) is described here.
Exact UN DESA DOI for WPP2024 not confirmed from the file itself, so left null rather than guessed.
